stemHtml: Some Flight Management Systems have dedicated navigation receivers (for example, DME) allowing for the automatic tune function. The main advantage of the automatic tuning is that...

options.a: tuning occurs much quicker than with manual selection.
options.b: tuning is also possible outside the Designated Operational Coverage (DOC).
options.c: the calculated position is more correct than with manual selection.
options.d: it provides the best available signals for position calculation.
